title: Japanese katana
description: Do you want to transform into a real samurai and take on the legendary katana of Japan and go smash monsters all over minecraft, welcome to the Japanese katana mod
body:
##   **Japanese katana**

> This mod was created to help you feel like samurai in the minecraft district and their inhabitants. Pick up the most powerful weapon and walk the path of a real samurai, proving to your sansei that you are capable of a lot...

>  Dilute your inventory with new swords and add a new type of katana to your collection.

> Become a powerful samurai of that era and defeat the dragon of the edge

## What's new
_I rethought my old work and realized that there was something missing, but there were more templates and different 3D models missing. I spent 24 hours on this job. I need time to create a really real augmented reality mod._

_**I also worked on adding additional blocks for this Katana weapon and studied in more detail the program for creating modifications for the Minecraft game.**_

_So far, only one version will be released, this is: 1.20.1 Forge, but in the future I will make more and more supported versions for this wonderful game._

## Developers

> Model creator: **Block Bench**

> Mod creator: **MCreator**

> Posted it on the website: **NIGHTBREZEE**

##  Katana Characteristics

_Damage: **14**_

_Attack speed: **6**_

_Endurance: **1700**_

## About the author

**I don't have a team, I work alone, and it wasn't until 2025 that I started studying a program like blockbench. It's already March, and I'm 55% ready to make normal mods to help players and interact with the world.**

**If you are ready to help me create a discord server mod, I am a very responsive and pleasant person. I will be happy to work with anyone who understands something about mods and the block bench program :)**
